message:
test: add SQLite fixture files for Cursor and OpenCode providers

Creates realistic SQLite test databases:
- Cursor: state.vscdb with modern v0.40+ fullConversationHeadersOnly format
- OpenCode: .opencode/opencode.db with sessions+messages tables

All 14 providers now have fixture files with expected canonical
summaries and integration tests (30 fixture tests, 659 total).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+{
+  "fixture_id": "cur_simple",
+  "provider_slug": "cursor",
+  "session_id": "cur-composer-001",
+  "workspace": "/home/user/webapp",
+  "title": "Implement database connection pooling",
+  "message_count": 4,
+  "roles": ["User", "Assistant", "User", "Assistant"],
+  "started_at_present": true,
+  "ended_at_present": true,
+  "model_name": "gpt-4",
+  "has_tool_calls": false,
+  "has_tool_results": false,
+  "known_lossy_fields": [],
+  "notes": "Cursor state.vscdb SQLite with modern v0.40+ fullConversationHeadersOnly format. Workspace from bubble workspaceProjectDir."
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+{
+  "fixture_id": "opc_simple",
+  "provider_slug": "opencode",
+  "session_id": "opc-session-001",
+  "workspace": "__DYNAMIC__",
+  "title": "Set up CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions",
+  "message_count": 4,
+  "roles": ["User", "Assistant", "User", "Assistant"],
+  "started_at_present": true,
+  "ended_at_present": true,
+  "model_name": "claude-3.5-sonnet",
+  "has_tool_calls": false,
+  "has_tool_results": false,
+  "known_lossy_fields": ["workspace"],
+  "notes": "OpenCode .opencode/opencode.db SQLite with sessions+messages tables. Workspace from db_path parent of .opencode/ dir — depends on fixture location so treated as lossy."
+}

@@ -186,6 +186,22 @@
       "category": "synthetic",
       "intent": "Pi-Agent JSONL with session header, toolResult role, and toolCall blocks. Underscore filename."
     },
+    "cur_simple": {
+      "provider": "cursor",
+      "format": "sqlite",

+      "expected": "expected/cur_simple.json",
+      "category": "synthetic",
+      "intent": "Cursor state.vscdb SQLite with modern v0.40+ format. 4-message conversation with workspace in bubble."
+    },

+      "format": "sqlite",
+      "path": "opencode/.opencode/opencode.db",
+      "expected": "expected/opc_simple.json",
+      "category": "synthetic",
+      "intent": "OpenCode SQLite with sessions+messages tables. 4-message session with model metadata."
+    },

       "provider": "claude-code",
       "format": "jsonl",
